opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: These crusty yellow sores appeared out of nowhere yesterday, and they are spreading across my face so incredibly fast.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Weeping crusty sores are spreading on my face fast and I'm worried about it and passing it on.

symptom_narrative.onset: ~48h ago around the nostrils after nose-blowing with a cold
symptom_narrative.character: yellow honey-coloured crusts on red skin, mildly itchy, not very painful
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around my nose, upper lip and one cheek
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: mildly itchy, not systemically unwell, no fever; no mouth involvement

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with family; shared towels/linen at home

objective_data_offered.value: yellow honey-coloured crusts on red base around nose/lip/cheek, some coalescing, visible on video
